name: code-council
description: Code Council — Review code changes where security, reliability, privacy, authentication, authorisation, data flow, or production stabil

parallel_agents.lens: Review correctness, maintainability, testability, and architecture fit. Would you be comfortable owning this code in production?
Review vulnerability classes, authentication/authorisation logic, secrets handling, injection, and abuse cases. Rate severity CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW.
Review deployment risk, rollback, observability, and failure modes. What happens at 2am when this breaks?
Run SAST, dependency checks, secret scanning, and tests. Report findings as evidence — this lens does not reason, it measures.
Look for edge cases, implicit trust, unsafe defaults, and missed data paths. What is being assumed that may be false?

fail_closed: Critical authentication, authorisation, cryptography, payment, privacy, or production-control changes require explicit human approval, not silent model confidence. Any CRITICAL finding blocks the merge pending human security review.
